message.content:
@startuml
participant FragmentVideoChat as FragmentVideoChat
participant LicodeConnector as LicodeConnector
participant PeerConnectionFactory as PeerConnectionFactory
participant RoomObserver as RoomObserver
participant MediaStream as MediaStream
participant PeerConnection as PeerConnection
participant StreamDescription as StreamDescription
participant LicodeSdpObserver as LicodeSdpObserver
participant LicodeServer as LicodeServer
participant SocketIOClient as SocketIOClient

participant LicodeConnector as LicodeConnector
participant PeerConnectionFactory as PeerConnectionFactory
participant RoomObserver as RoomObserver
participant MediaStream as MediaStream
participant PeerConnection as PeerConnection
participant StreamDescription as StreamDescription
participant LicodeSdpObserver as LicodeSdpObserver
participant LicodeServer as LicodeServer
participant SocketIOClient as SocketIOClient

init
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : configureConnector
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : init
    FragmentVideoChat --> RoomObserver : addObserver(RoomObserver)

Publish
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : startCastView.onClick
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : requestPublish
    LicodeConnector --> PeerConnectionFactory : triggerPublishAllowed
    PeerConnectionFactory --> LicodeConnector : onPublishAllowed
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : startPublish
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : makeVideoView
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : publish(VideoStreamsView)
    LicodeConnector --> MediaStream : doPublish

Publish-create media
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : createLocalMediaStream
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : createMediaConstraints
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : getVideoCapturer
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : createVideoSource(VideoCapturer, MediaConstraints)
    FragmentVideoChat --> PeerConnection : createVideoTrack(String, VideoSource)
    PeerConnection --> PeerConnectionFactory : addTrack
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : createAudioSource(MediaConstraints)
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : createAudioTrack(String, AudioSource)
    MediaStream --> PeerConnection : addTrack

Publish-create offer
    FragmentVideoChat --> PeerConnectionFactory : makePeerConstraints
    FragmentVideoChat --> PeerConnectionFactory : create MyPcObserver
    FragmentVideoChat --> PeerConnectionFactory : createPeerConnectionList(<keServer>, MediaConstraints, Observer)
    PeerConnectionFactory --> PeerConnection : addStream(MediaStream, MediaConstraints)
    FragmentVideoChat --> PeerConnection : setMedia
    FragmentVideoChat --> PeerConnection : attachRenderer
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeSdpObserver : initLocalPeerConnection_SdpObserver
    LicodeSdpObserver --> PeerConnection : createOffer
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : onCreateSuccess
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : setLocalDescription
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : onSetSuccess
    LicodeServer --> LicodeSdpObserver : sendLocalDescription
    LicodeSdpObserver --> LicodeServer : sendSDPSocket("publish")
    LicodeServer --> PeerConnection : publish
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : publish success
    LicodeServer --> RoomObserver : setRemoteDescription

Subscribe
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : startVideoChat
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : createToken
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : http
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : Load Balance
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : createToken success
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : connect
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : createToken
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : decodeToken
    LicodeConnector --> SocketIOClient : connect to server
    SocketIOClient --> LicodeConnector : socket
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : onConnectCompleted

Subscribe-listen socket events
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : listen evnets
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : onAddStream
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : onSubscribe2P
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : onPublish2P
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : onDataStream
    FragmentVideoChat --> MediaStream : onRemoveStream
    FragmentVideoChat --> LicodeConnector : disconnect
    LicodeConnector --> SocketIOClient : sendMessageSocket("token")
    SocketIOClient --> LicodeConnector : token success
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : onRoomConnected
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : setBandwidthLimits
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : alt [has streams]
        LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : triggerStreamAdded
        LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : mOnAddStream
        LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : triggerStreamAdded
    end
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : onStreamAdded
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : subscribe
    LicodeConnector --> MediaStream : doSubscribe
    MediaStream --> LicodeConnector : triggerMediaAvailable
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : onStreamMediaAvailable
    LicodeConnector --> LicodeConnector : makeVideoView
    LicodeConnector --> PeerConnection : attachRenderer
    PeerConnection --> LicodeConnector : createMyPcObserver
    PeerConnectionFactory --> PeerConnection : CreatePeerConnection
    PeerConnectionFactory --> LicodeSdpObserver : initRemotePeerConnection_SdpObserver
    LicodeSdpObserver --> PeerConnection : createOffer
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : onCreateSuccess
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : setLocalDescription
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : onSetSuccess
    LicodeServer --> LicodeSdpObserver : sendLocalDescription
    LicodeSdpObserver --> LicodeServer : sendSDPSocket("subscribe")
    LicodeServer --> PeerConnection : subscribe success
    PeerConnection --> LicodeServer : setRemoteDescription

@enduml
